claims.summary: Witness sequence IDs should remain collision-free under concurrent capture.
claims.disposition: Verified atomic sequence construction and concurrency tests.

claims.summary: Long technical identities should hash deterministically and remain distinct.
claims.disposition: Verified exact threshold, deterministic hash, and distinct-input tests.

claims.summary: Spectral entropy and density gradient should be available as whitelisted parameter observations.
The witness should retain the complete artifact hash and source snapshot without raw private prose.
claims.disposition: Verified artifact, window, file, and source hashes plus no-prose tests.

claims.summary: A dedicated spectral-gradient field or higher identity-length threshold is required for continuity.
claims.disposition: Verified existing typed observations and deterministic bounded identity make the requested duplication unnecessary.
